views.markdown:
# TweetDownloader

Always-on, one-tap, best-quality media downloader for the official Twitter app.

Adds a download button to every tweet that has media, no menu digging, no "save as" dialog.

## Features

- Download button at the top-right of every tweet with media (timeline, tweet details, conversation, and quoted tweets)
- Extra download buttons in the fullscreen photo slideshow viewer and fullscreen video (immersive) player, so you can save the exact photo/video you're looking at
- Photos are saved at `:orig` (original) quality, not the downscaled timeline preview
- Videos are saved at the highest available bitrate
- Saves straight to the camera roll, no confirmation dialog
- A small percentage HUD in the top-left shows download progress, including for multi-photo tweets

## Compatibility

- Confirmed working on Twitter app 11.93 (`com.atebits.Tweetie2`). Probably works fine on other versions though.
- Rootless jailbreak (Dopamine), iOS 15+ (probably very easy to convert to rootfull im just very lazy)

## Install

Add `https://mikey820.github.io/repo/` to Sileo/Zebra and install **TweetDownloader**.

## Building from source

```bash
make package FINALPACKAGE=1 THEOS_PACKAGE_SCHEME=rootless
```

Requires [Theos](https://theos.dev) with the iOS 16.5 SDK.

## How it works

Twitter's status views (`T1StandardStatusView`, `T1TweetDetailsFocalStatusView`, `T1ConversationFocalStatusView`, `T1SlideshowStatusView`) are hooked to inject a download button next to each tweet's media, and the fullscreen slideshow/immersive view controllers are hooked separately for their own download buttons. Tapping a button walks the tweet's view model to find its media entities, resolves photo URLs to `:orig` quality and videos to their highest-bitrate variant, and queues them through a small download manager that reports progress and saves each item to the camera roll via `PHPhotoLibrary`.

### v1.0.0

Always-on top-right download button for Twitter/X. Best-quality photo/video to camera roll. Twitter 11.93, Dopamine rootless (arm64/arm64e).
